LanguageData.Ammo_4mmRailgun_Sabot.label: 4mm Railgun cartridge (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_4mmRailgun_Sabot.description: Fin-stabilized tungsten carbide penetrator with discarding sabot, designed for railgun rifles.

LanguageData.Ammo_4mmRailgun_API.description: Fin-stabilized tungsten carbide penetrator with discarding sabot, designed for railgun rifles.
